# MCP Weather Server Forecast Test
# Tests the get_weather_forecast tool functionality
# Note: These tests simulate API calls and may require mocking for CI

# Build the weather server binary
go build -o mcp-weather-server .

# Set API key for tests
env OPENWEATHER_API_KEY=test_api_key_123

# Test weather forecast for London (without specifying units - should default to metric)
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_weather_forecast","arguments":{"location":"London"}},"id":2}
EOF

# Since this will likely fail with invalid API key, we expect an error response
stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error getting weather forecast'

# Test weather forecast with metric units explicitly
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_weather_forecast","arguments":{"location":"Barcelona,ES","units":"metric"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error getting weather forecast'

# Test weather forecast with imperial units
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_weather_forecast","arguments":{"location":"Chicago,US","units":"imperial"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error getting weather forecast'

# Test weather forecast with kelvin units
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_weather_forecast","arguments":{"location":"Seoul,KR","units":"kelvin"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error getting weather forecast'

# Test forecast for various international cities
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_weather_forecast","arguments":{"location":"Sydney,AU"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error getting weather forecast'

# Test forecast for city with complex name
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_weather_forecast","arguments":{"location":"Mexico City,MX"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error getting weather forecast'

# Test multiple forecast requests in sequence
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_weather_forecast","arguments":{"location":"Amsterdam"}},"id":2}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_weather_forecast","arguments":{"location":"Brussels"}},"id":3}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_weather_forecast","arguments":{"location":"Copenhagen"}},"id":4}
EOF

# All should fail with test API key
stdout '"isError":true'

# Test mixing current weather and forecast calls
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_weather","arguments":{"location":"Vienna"}},"id":2}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_weather_forecast","arguments":{"location":"Vienna"}},"id":3}
EOF

# Both should fail with test API key
stdout '"isError":true'
